title: Research Colloquium in Jewish Philosophy and Intellectual History
further_info: Recommended Reading Will be announced during the course. Award of 1 ECTS credit for delivering a presentation. This option is available only for colloquia comprising a minimum of 7.5 contact hours or at least five sessions of 90 minutes each. For information on how this course can be applied within different degree programs, please refer to the section “Module / Applicability in Degree Programs” in the Commented Course Catalog (KVV) of the HfJS.
